title: rubus neillioides
intro: Rubus neillioides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rubus neillioides include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Rubus nellioides is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed raw or used in the form of jams and preserves.
